name: viet-bazi-engine
description: Offline-first, deterministic Bazi/Four Pillars calculation engine for Vietnamese applications.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && sh scripts/build-wasm.sh && node scripts/export-schemas.mjs
scripts.pages:build: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-pages.mjs && node scripts/test-pages-artifact.mjs
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run test:python-wheel && node scripts/release-preflight.mjs
scripts.test: vitest run && npm run build && node scripts/test-schema-artifacts.mjs && node scripts/test-wasm.mjs && node scripts/test-cli.mjs && node scripts/test-demo.mjs && node scripts/serve-demo.mjs --check && node scripts/test-demo-server.mjs && node scripts/test-release-workflow.mjs && node scripts/test-pages-workflow.mjs && npm run test:conformance
